ValidationRule.description: This validation block user to add the wrong account on the cases.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName <> "CaseExternalFrance", NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Hub_Latam_Subsidiaries,TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c))),RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", NOT(ISBLANK(AccountId)), OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (NOT(CONTAINS ($Label.Baltics_Nordics_Croatia, TEXT($User.Subsidiary__c)))), NOT(OR(TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c) = TEXT($User.Subsidiary__c), AND(ISPICKVAL($User.Subsidiary__c,'AUSTRIA'),ISPICKVAL(Account.Subsidiary__c,'SWITZERLAND'))))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (CONTAINS($Label.SRM_Baltic_Subsidiaries, TEXT($User.Subsidiary__c))), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.SRM_Baltic_Subsidiaries, TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c)))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (CONTAINS($Label.Croatia_CPM, TEXT ($User.Subsidiary__c))), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Croatia_CPM, TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c)))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (CONTAINS($Label.Finland_subsidiaries, TEXT($User.Subsidiary__c))), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Finland_subsidiaries, TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c)))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (CONTAINS($Label.Denmark_subsidiaries, TEXT($User.Subsidiary__c))), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Denmark_subsidiaries, TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c)))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (CONTAINS($Label.Sweden_subsidiaries, TEXT ($User.Subsidiary__c))), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Sweden_subsidiaries, TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c)))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Case_External_Legal", (CONTAINS($Label.Norway_Subsidiaries, TEXT ($User.Subsidiary__c))), NOT(CONTAINS($Label.Norway_Subsidiaries, TEXT(Account.Subsidiary__c)))), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Case_External_Legal", OR($Permission.BIZ_InternationalCoordinator, CONTAINS($Label.International_Profile, $Profile.Name)), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account.Subsidiary_Indicator__c,"25000"))) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to use this account. On local cases, you can only add local accounts from a subsidiary you are working for. On international cases, you can only add IVAs or NVAs. If you have any concern, please contact your local admin.
